# placeholder

**Instance Property**

A string that’s displayed in the compose view’s text view when the text view is empty.

## Declaration

```swift
var placeholder: String! { get set }
```

## Managing the Contents of the Post

- **contentText**: A string that represents the text which the user entered into the compose view’s text view.
- **textView**: The editable text view in the compose view.
